**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Avoid formatting calls without directives. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
fmt.Sprintf("static message")
```

## Good

```go
fmt.Sprint(value)
```
